_comment: Helix Thready Lottie asset manifest — concrete form of the prototypes.md §6 excerpt. [DEFAULT — adjustable]. reducedMotion: 'freeze-poster' = load frozen at posterFrame; 'final-frame' = jump to last frame instantly; 'instant-cut' = skip the transition entirely. reducedMotionFallback names the static SVG (same directory) rendering the exact freeze-poster/final-frame state — delivered 2026-07-22, closing the asset half of THREADY-MOT-03; geometry is derived from the Lottie keyframes, see each SVG's header. posterFrame freezing remains the equivalent runtime alternative where an swap is inconvenient. transition-fade-slide is 'instant-cut' by contract — no fallback artwork exists on purpose. The prototypes §6 excerpt also names empty-channels.svg for an 'empty-channels' illustration; that animation is not part of this set (illustration-grade assets stay open under THREADY-DES-02), so it is intentionally absent here.

runtime.tui: none — Lipgloss spinner/progress primitives via the token bridge
